info.english_meaning: to praise to be glad to be proud to sleep to shine to move slowly to intoxicate
info.hindI_arTa: stuti karanA tuzwa karanA Ananda karanA unmatta honA sonA cAhanA camakanA prakASita honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: stutyAdO mandate harze mAdyet mAdayate Rici' (Slò. 112) iti devaH  ' modo = harzaH mado = garvaH svapnaH = Alasyam  candrastu ' madi jAqye ' ityeva papAWa  ' stutigatiByAm anyatra akarmakaH' iti mADavIyaDAtuvfttiH  ' svapnenAlasyamapi lakzyate ' iti kzIrasvAmI  DAtorasya kAntyarTakatvaM kezAYcidasammatam

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yAM tvA jano BUmiriti pramandate' (vA॰ma॰12.64) pramandate prasIdati modata iti sAyaRaH
'dAnAya SUramudamandizuH sutAH' (f0 9811) aBizutAH somAH SUramindraM dAnAyodDarzayanti protsAhayanti loke madirAtmanepadI
